content: I'm a player of Sialia version and I don't know how to purchase because the website only accept taiwan visa

The power up version of the Embryo card produced by Thais has a strange wording: "Can be Devour and trigger 2 effects"
I think it should be changed in to: "Can be consumed to trigger the Devour effect 2 times" or something on those lines to make the effect more clear.

So, in the lineups, when you have a team with a character that has a covenant, and you switch to another team with the same character at the same spot but normally no covenants, then the covenant will still appear on the other team.
And vice-versa, if you go from a team that the character has no covenant to a team where that character has a covenant, it will show it doesn't have a covenant.

Further testing led me to notice that in fact it also happens with 2 different covenants, as long as the same character is on the same spot in the team, changing team will visually override the covenant on the other team.

This doesn't happen if the character is not on the same spot in the team however.

As shown in the video, pay attention to Thais's Covenant.

The magical hat randomly changes the arithmetica cost of most cards that you draw (an exclusion is for example Jenkin' ult). The cards glow yellow for reduced/ same arithmetica cost and red for increased arithmetica cost compared to the cards original cost. This however blocks any visual clues that you normally get for card abilities. I have not seen a case where those colours from the Hat actually help, it just makes it more difficult to navigate your hand, especially since it is not uncommon to hold 10+ cards, on top of the Hat also making you draw 2 additional cards at the start of the turn.
I suggest either completely removing the visual clue from the had, or making it so that the visual clue comes in a different form, like the number itself on the card being yellow/ red to indicate the change in cost or there being a little upwards-pointing yellow arrow/ downwards-pointing red arrow next to the number of each cards arithmetica cost.
thread_title: Change visual effect of Trickster's Hat

content:
To easily drop the burden of daily dive, could you please remove the relic bonus to the final score?

I would love it if I didn't have to get my relic bar full to get a high score and I could just skip ahead to the boss and noticed fight most of the battles.

So if I only have 1 relic, my score isn't lower than someone with 8 relics.

You can check my account and see that I've been missing completing these dailies as they just take to long with some event tasks too.

Just checked the game since I wasn’t sure if I did my daily run in Phantasmal Drive and upon entering the game was hit with a pop-up of an „Investigation supply box“, which had 2 hours left on it. I do not know if it was a temporary thing that the devs gave everyone for free or if I somehow unlocked it but didn’t know. Point is, is that I had no idea that this was there and would have missed it if not for me being unsure about the daily.
If this is something that I obtained through doing something, then the notification is bugged since I got none upon meeting the condition.
If this was given to all players as a little gift, then I ask to make the claim time for such gifts 24 hours since it sucks to miss something like this (no matter if you put money into it or not) just because you didn’t log in at a seemingly random time (even if the time isn’t random and you would give such a gift every day at the same time and the claim time was a few hours, people would still be busy/ be asleep due to different time zones and could still not claim it), aka you simply being unlucky.
thread_title: More time for investigation supply box
